arts.ttl: There were days when I wondered if I would ever play for Aston Villa again
arts.sum: "It also means I have seen way worse in the last 16, 17 months than bad days in football, which means I can contextualise it a little bit and means I am very calm after a loss of bad performance. Tyrone Mings has admitted there were times when he didn't think he would be able to recover from his knee injury due to the severity of it.

arts.ttl: 'What we've been missing' - Aston Villa find solution as winless run ends vs Brentford - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Morgan Rogers, Ollie Watkins and Matty Cash all found the net within 13 minutes in the first half, giving Villa as many goals as they had scored in their previous six matches across all competitions. Crichy agrees: "Mings was excellent, Ollie was very good his link up play was great,Rogers was excellent best game he had in a while hopefully he can kick on now, thought Duran also did very well, some lovely quick slick football at times more of the same please, overall a very good performance, and a badly needed three points."
